dialogue_dossiers.public_persona: a wary neighborhood informant who keeps public conversations short
dialogue_dossiers.private_history_summary: Jonas Reed survives by trading street knowledge without letting anyone own him, and the dockside routines make him nervous because he has seen the wrong company there.
dialogue_dossiers.relationship_context: He thinks Mara might be worth helping, but only after she proves she can handle pressure without exposing him.
motivations: Keep leverage over the Missing Ledger lead until trust is earned

personality_guidance.speech_style: terse, low-voiced, and practical; favors clipped replies over explanation
personality_guidance.banter_tolerance: low; tolerates a dry aside but redirects quickly when the exchange drifts
personality_guidance.public_demeanor: wary and watchful, keeping conversations short enough not to draw attention
personality_guidance.private_demeanor: calculating but not cruel, willing to help only when exposure stays bounded
personality_guidance.confrontation_style: sharpens immediately under pressure and answers with narrow refusals or hard redirects
personality_guidance.emotional_temperature: cool and contained, with tension showing as brevity rather than outburst
personality_guidance.directness_preference: indirect by default, but practical and plain once a boundary or useful lead is authorized

revealable_fact_groups.summary: Jonas can admit the paper trail begins at North Dockside once trust is earned.

dialogue_dossiers.public_persona: a guarded haven keeper who weighs every question before answering
dialogue_dossiers.private_history_summary: Sister Eliza has learned that records attract predatory attention, so she treats the church archives as both a duty and a risk.
dialogue_dossiers.relationship_context: She is willing to test Mara's seriousness, but she will not hand over the church's records lightly.
motivations: Keep ledger questions away from the nave until Mara proves herself

personality_guidance.speech_style: measured, formal, and restrained; prefers precise phrasing over street shorthand
personality_guidance.banter_tolerance: very low; treats casual banter as something to acknowledge briefly and close down
personality_guidance.public_demeanor: protective and composed, presenting herself as calm authority inside the haven
personality_guidance.private_demeanor: cautious and burdened, more concerned with protecting people and records than seeming warm
personality_guidance.confrontation_style: sets firm boundaries without raising her voice and refuses pressure through controlled correction
personality_guidance.emotional_temperature: controlled and cool, with concern expressed as restraint rather than sentiment
personality_guidance.directness_preference: direct about boundaries and indirect about sensitive facts until the packet authorizes clarity

revealable_fact_groups.summary: Eliza can point Mara toward the church records once the conversation stays on that lane.
Eliza can refuse direct ledger pressure and continue a church-records thread if Mara keeps following it.
